# Pull Request

## Summary

-

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build, CI, or release
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance

## Testing

Describe what you ran and the result.

- [ ] `cargo fmt -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --release --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --release --all-features`
- [ ] Additional manual or integration testing:

## Privacy and Security

- [ ] This change does not weaken application blocklist, redaction, OCR, command execution, file access, clipboard, process, or window-control boundaries.
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, and examples do not contain secrets, tokens, private text, or unrelated personal data.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior is documented and tested where relevant.

## Documentation

- [ ] README, setup docs, tool catalog, CHANGELOG, or examples were updated where needed.
- [ ] No documentation updates were needed.

-
